name: Jezabel Jam (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the prepared horseradish, peach-pineapple jam, and apple jelly in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Stir in the dry mustard and ground white pepper to taste.
4. Transfer the mixture into a jar or container with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Store the jar in the refrigerator.
